purpose: Stop hook (no matcher). Checks at agent stop time whether any active swarm exists without a completion report and warns if so. Iterates all non-ide dashboards' initialization.json; for each with task!=null, reads logs.json and searches for completion phrases ('swarm complete', 'all tasks completed', 'swarm finished', 'completion report' — case-insensitive). If no completion message found, emits a non-blocking warning telling the agent to consider running !status or completing the swarm. Stop hooks can only warn, never block.
gotchas: Stop hooks cannot block agent termination — only warn
Iterates ALL non-ide dashboards on every Stop — O(N) over dashboards × logs
Completion regex is a fixed alternation list — adding new completion phrasings requires hook update
Stops at first warning emission (warn() exits) — only the first incomplete swarm is reported per stop event
Wired in BOTH .claude/settings.json (global Stop) AND .claude/agents/master-orchestrator.md (role-scoped Stop)
patterns: Multi-dashboard sweep with per-dashboard completion scan
